entry.data:
SUNNY, WINDY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE UPPER 80S
SOUTH WINDS 20 TO 30 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 40 MPH

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS, BREEZY WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 25 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 40 MPH, DIMINISHING TO 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
